_risk_level_doc: Single markdown file edit; no code changes; no user-triggered path affected.

requirement.original: Task 20260526-052559 left a doc-only defect (drift-1): the Edge Cases section of docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md contains a stale, insecure M5 allowlist regex that predates the final BA-QA iteration. Update the Edge Cases section to replace the stale regex with the correct authoritative regex (matching the Technical Hints section and _BULK_CANONICAL_RE in hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh).
requirement.clarified: Replace the stale iteration-2 M5 regex in the Critical regression risk bullet inside ## Edge Cases & Risks of docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md with the authoritative end-anchored no-arg regex from the Technical Hints section and hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:678 (_BULK_CANONICAL_RE). No other changes.
requirement.what: Single regex string replacement in one markdown file
requirement.why: The stale regex (no start/end anchors, optional double-venv group, unescaped dot) is misleading: a reader sees a form that would match forged-argument suffixes, contradicting both the Technical Hints section and production behavior.

included: docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md — Edge Cases section, Critical regression risk bullet, stale regex string
excluded: Technical Hints section of the same file (already correct — do not modify)

success_criteria: Stale regex is absent from Edge Cases section
Authoritative end-anchored no-arg regex is present in Edge Cases section
Git diff shows exactly one file, exactly one line changed
constraints: Doc-only change — no code, no tests, no hook modifications
Hook file is reference-only; do not modify it
Frozen spec docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-044700.md must not be touched

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Edge Cases section of ticket-20260526-052559.md contains the pre-final M5 regex (iteration-2 form) with optional double-venv group and no terminal $ anchor — form that would match --sid FORGED suffixes.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The ticket was produced before the final BA-QA iteration settled on the correct end-anchored no-arg regex. The Technical Hints section was updated during that iteration but the Edge Cases bullet was not synchronized.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A — doc-only drift, not a code regression
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Iterative BA refinement updated Technical Hints to the final form but left Edge Cases on the previous iteration's wording.
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Misleading documentation: a reader of Edge Cases sees a weaker regex that would pass forged-argument suffixes, contradicting the security intent documented in Technical Hints and the actual production behavior.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Introduced during task 20260526-052559 BA cycle; persisted through QA sign-off of that cycle (which verified hook behavior, not ticket internal consistency).
observations: docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md:120 contains stale regex (inferred: file read)
docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md:197 contains authoritative regex (inferred: file read)
hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:678 contains _BULK_CANONICAL_RE matching the authoritative form (inferred: grep read)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Read docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md line 120 (Edge Cases) and line 197 (Technical Hints); grep hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh for _BULK_CANONICAL_RE at line 678. Stale form vs authoritative form confirmed by direct string comparison.

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: N/A — doc-only drift, not a code regression requiring bisect

requirements_decomposition.source_phrase: replace the stale regex with the correct authoritative regex (matching the Technical Hints section and _BULK_CANONICAL_RE in hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh)
requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: Edge Cases Critical regression risk bullet contains the authoritative end-anchored no-arg regex; stale form is absent

component_chain.role: Target: Edge Cases section containing the stale regex string at line 120
component_chain.evidence: Read tool: line 120 contains stale regex with optional double-venv group and no terminal $ anchor

component_chain.role: Reference: _BULK_CANONICAL_RE — authoritative source for the correct regex

setup.reason: non-UI -- doc-only; cycle modifies one historical BA ticket markdown file only. Does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths.

evidence.observed: Edge Cases section of docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md contains a stale, insecure M5 allowlist regex that predates the final BA-QA iteration
evidence.gap: Stale form: missing ^ and $ anchors; contains optional double-venv group; unescaped . in /root/.claude/. Correct form: fully anchored, no optional group, escaped dot.

scope_expansion.search_pattern: optional double-venv group / stale regex unique string

reference_source.description: _BULK_CANONICAL_RE in production hook, corroborated by Technical Hints section of the same ticket

novelty_check.rationale: No prior attempts; first cycle for this doc-only drift fix.

context.codebase_state: docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md exists; hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:678 carries _BULK_CANONICAL_RE as the authoritative regex
context.recent_commits: c88eed8 auto-bulk: end-of-cycle commit for master

development_approach.strategy: Single targeted string replacement in docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md Edge Cases section. Replace stale regex with authoritative regex. No other changes.
development_approach.validation_approach: Inspect git diff: one file, one line changed. Grep for stale string absent; authoritative string present in Edge Cases section. Confirm Technical Hints section unchanged.

research_findings.reason: MICRO tier doc-only fix; no research warranted

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 5 findings, all classified as in_scope_minor (scope tightening). All applied.

findings.issue: AC4 could be misread as requiring new tests or hook-level verification, expanding a MICRO doc-only fix.
findings.proposed_fix: Reword AC4 to inspection-only: 'By inspection or one-off local regex check only ... Do not add tests or modify hook code.'
findings.rationale: Applied: AC4 now explicitly states 'verification is by inspection only — do not add tests or modify hook code.'

findings.issue: AC2 'agree' phrasing is broad and could invite edits outside the stale Edge Cases occurrence.
findings.proposed_fix: Make AC2 exact: 'byte-for-byte identical to the existing Technical Hints regex; Technical Hints remains unchanged.'
findings.rationale: Applied: AC2 now says 'byte-for-byte identical' and 'Technical Hints is unchanged from its pre-fix state.'

findings.issue: Line-number-only targeting is brittle if line numbers drift.
findings.proposed_fix: Target by section + unique stale string; treat line 120 as advisory.
findings.rationale: Applied: Technical Hints specify 'Target location: ## Edge Cases & Risks section, Critical regression risk bullet, line ~120 (treat as advisory; target by section + unique stale string).'

findings.issue: Reference to hook as authoritative could accidentally broaden task into hook auditing or hook editing.
findings.proposed_fix: State explicitly: 'Hook file is reference-only. Do not modify hook code. If hook no longer matches authoritative regex, pause/report.'
findings.rationale: Applied: Reference Source Dev constraint and Non-Goals both carry explicit hook-reference-only wording.

findings.issue: 'no other sections modified' should be mechanically checkable.
findings.proposed_fix: Add: 'Final diff must show a single-line replacement in docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md and no other files/sections changed.'
findings.rationale: Applied: AC3 now specifies 'exactly one file modified, exactly one line changes, no other sections modified.'

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 5 Codex findings applied — AC4 narrowed to inspection-only, AC2 tightened to byte-for-byte equality, line-number targeting made advisory, hook-reference-only made explicit in two places, diff constraint added to AC3.
